label: independent
hint_value: after extending the tape to the desired length, press the front locking tab down until it locks into place.

thinking.text: Okay, so the question is about how to lock a tape measure. The options are A and B. Let me think. I remember using a tape measure before. When you extend it, there's a little tab or button at the front. To lock it, you usually have to press that tab down, right? Because when you pull it up, maybe that releases it instead. Wait, some tape measures have a locking mechanism that you engage by pressing down. Let me visualize it. The front part has a small lever or a button. If you press it down, it clicks into place and holds the tape. If you lift it, it disengages the lock so you can retract it. So if you need to lock the tape after extending, you'd press the tab down. That would make the answer B. But wait, I should double-check. Maybe some models are different. But generally, I think most tape measures require you to press the front locking tab down to lock. So the answer is B.

question_text: how to lock a tape measure.

choices.A: after extending the tape to the desired length, pull the front locking tab up until it locks into place.
choices.B: after extending the tape to the desired length, press the front locking tab down until it locks into place.
